hook: Dating gets calmer when you stop confusing attention with alignment.
body: Interest is one variable; fit is several variables working together over time.

hook: Scarcity makes men overvalue any spark of attention and underweight whether the dynamic is actually healthy.
body: Your standards should ask not only whether she likes you, but whether the connection brings out your better self.

hook: Your standards should ask not only whether she likes you, but whether the connection brings out your better self.
body: Strong chemistry with weak reciprocity is usually a volatility warning, not a romantic destiny signal.

hook: Strong chemistry with weak reciprocity is usually a volatility warning, not a romantic destiny signal.
body: After each date, rate mutual effort, ease, curiosity, and follow-through before rating chemistry alone.
